keyword.title: Search Keyword
keyword.description: Job title or skill keyword to search (e.g. 'python')

siteKey.title: Market (Country)
siteKey.description: Choose the country site (e.g. MY-Main, SG-Main, PH-Main, ID-Main, TH-Main, HK-Main)

where.title: Location Filter
where.description: Location to search (e.g. 'Kuala Lumpur', 'Singapore'). Leave blank for nationwide.

maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of jobs to scrap.
